narrative:
Cols 70-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 903 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
